reviews.review_title: I hope there's more to come in updates..
reviews.review_description:
Training: fly left, fly right
Next level: fly through 2 circles
Advance game play: fly through a circle, land on the carrier- game over. 
Total game play time: 15 mins
Free flight or missions, working cannons and missiles something more than just landing on a boat would be better. Hopefully they'll add this in the future because I was really looking forward to playing this🤞 And if you're not looking at the throttle it won't grab it.

developer_response.body:
Yes! More content is on the way. Thanks for your comments

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!

reviews.review_title: I wouldn't buy it rn if I were you
reviews.review_description:
Honestly it has some potential but it's really bad rn.
Originally it said "f/a 18 (PILOT) simulator but now it's f/a 18 landing simulator.
Like you mean to tell me I waited like 4 weeks just for it to switch up and say "nope all you can do is land rather than actually fly around" and guess what I can't even refund it!
First off, all you can do is land an f/a 18 and nothing else.
It also has no options like you can't fly the f4,f14,etc only the f/a 18.
Tbh I would give this a 4 maybe 5 star rating if it had free fly and let you use the weapons but RN it's not good and I would not recommend buying. 
I honestly feel like the devs of this game should give the people who pre bought this game free access to the navy simulator that comes out in July.

developer_response.body:
We understand your concern. 
This game is designed to be a landing competition, where you try to perfect your landing skills to beat out other players. We have updates in the works, including a replay system so you can watch your landings from different camera angles, and additional landing challenges. Please send an email and we can explain in a bit more detail: mail@tasappsystems.com , thanks

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_title: Excellent Flight Sim with Huge Potential
reviews.review_description:
This is an excellent game with a lot of potential. I love how realistic it looks and how the jet handles. The graphics are impressive, and the overall flying experience is very enjoyable.

I highly recommend it.

If I could add one feature, it would be a Free Flight mode that allows players to take off from the aircraft carrier and land back on it at will. That would be an epic addition and would definitely satisfy the cravings of many flight simulation enthusiasts.

Cheers to the devs who made this game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comments and thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description: 15 minutes and 3 landings later-have I played through the full game or am I missing something? This game was delayed 10 weeks so I’m hoping there’s more here and I’m just missing it somehow.

developer_response.body:
This is purely a landing simulator, with the focus on mastering the landing (ie: your grading system).  The delays were due to optimizing the ocean to run smoothly on the Quest, as well as get the physics right for the arrestor cables and landing grading system.  Replay will come next week

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description: Don't waste time on this one, after about 3 landings, well, time to move on....zero fun, I was really hoping this would be exciting simulator. Graphics are good, but no excitement, at least free fly for a few minutes. I was disappointed to say the least.

developer_response.body:
We’re adding new game modes and a replay system to view your landings. Part of the fun comes from trying to master the landing, and increasing your score. But stay tuned for more content

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description: Thought I read all switches and levers were active. Dynamic carrier and sea movement. I see None of that. Two switches one lever. Unless there’s more on the horizon. I’m feeling one star is being more than generous.

developer_response.body:
The throttle, hook, gear, flaps, instrumentation battery, apu, and both engines have the proper switches. Currently there’s only carrier landing challenges so you don’t have to start the aircraft. The cockpit will go dark and engines power off if flipped however.

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

Thanks for the comments.
We’ll look into this asap!

reviews.review_description:
If your goal is to practice and master carrier landings, this game delivers. The core experience is there. The approach feels authentic, as far as I can tell, and it's pretty exhilarating when you crash and rewarding when you connect with those cables.

The graphics are really good.  I'm loving the cockpit and shadows.

That said, if you’re looking for missions,  this isn’t really that kind of game. The focus is narrow, very polished, but very specific. 

Overall, it’s a great pick to have some quick fun and try to best your friends scores.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for checking us out...there will be updates to come.  Replay next week!

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description:
Obviously it's a big step forward in flight simulator apps on quest3 with some improvements like adding free flights & discovering missions and maneuvering skills  also the instruments like engine status....
Over all congratulations wich you the best 👌 hope i will change it soon to 5 🌟 soon .
Appreciate your effort

developer_response.body: Thank you for the comments, there will be updates!

reviews.review_description:
This is actually a pretty fun carrier landing game!

I enjoyed the details of the cockpit and the overall experience of trying to connect the hook to the carrier cables. It’s a lot harder than it looks!

After each landing, you are graded on your attempt which keeps you coming back to improve your skills. I hope we see new updates!

Its a little limited as far as whats in the game as of yet, but I haven't really play played it yet. Jets a little sluggish feeling and the cockpit looks kinda big and to far forward. Then again, its 3:30 in the morning and im sitting on the toilet and not my normal chair I play from so that might have something to do with it. Buuut, I stuck the landing on the 3rd try, the advanced landing on the 4th. Haven't been to sleep in 2 days so id probably have nailed it first try on both but that pesky delirium stuff is kicking in but this is where I was when I realized the game was ready for download so it is what it is. Well take a nap, and try it in my game chair later today and see what's up with it. Gotta say tho, the graphics look great, im just hoping it's more than just landing on a carrier and thats it. I've noticed that that other pilot game they have coming out, actually shares a few pictures with this one so im hoping they didn't just sell us 2 landings on pre order so they could release the whole game under another title and sell it to us for 14/19 dollars cause they felt a little jipped over selling this one for 7 bucks lol. Js, that would be kinda petty of them to do that cause if this game only consists of 2 landings and some voice stuff, then imma feel a lot jipped instead of just a little jipped 🤷🏼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comments, more content is on the way!

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description: I be this is early access but only 2 landings and nothing else to do. Please add some more landings and some free flight would be good 👍

developer_response.body:
Yep! More gameplay modes are coming! Stay tuned for some cool updates!

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description: Short, but challenging. It's got to get better. Can't wait to see the next updates. I'm hoping for campaigns / combat, and single missions. Waiting to make it a 5-star game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your support. Tomorrow we expect to push an update that adds a cool replay system to view your landings. Next week, hands support (fly without the controllers), and new landing challenges

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description: Much better than it was on release
15 mins it took me this needs some serious love from the developer its missing gameplay

developer_response.body:
The landings are graded and rated based on weight on the wheels, distance to center line, etc. We also have new challenges arriving next week

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated

reviews.review_description: A tech demo. Not worth $.99 let alone $9.99.

developer_response.body:
Updates are in the works, but this is a landing sim. The relatability is improving your landing score. The graphics, physics, etc. took over a year to develop alone

Update: Please check out the latest update.  We've added a new landing mode (Expert mode with turbulence and rain), as well as two new challenges.  More to come next week!  If you don't mind updating your review with updated thoughts that would be appreciated
